ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the course (e.g., AAH-1010) */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "course_number" INTEGER /* Course number associated with the course */,
  "section" INTEGER /* Section number for the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the section */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is offered online */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of prerequisite course IDs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the instructor */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  "title" TEXT /* Academic title of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the student */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled at the university */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., Active, Graduated, On Leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "section" INTEGER /* Section number for the enrolled course */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of enrollment (e.g., Active, Withdrawn) */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., Letter, GPA) */,
  "final_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the final exam */,
  "midterm_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the midterm exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the grade record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment record associated with the grade */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received by the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA value corresponding to the grade */,
  "honors" TEXT /* Honors designation (if any) */,
  "letter_grade" TEXT /* Letter grade (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the academic year */,
  "year_start" INTEGER /* Start year of the academic year */,
  "year_end" INTEGER /* End year of the academic year */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Art and Architecture) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistical record */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course being analyzed */,
  "average_grade" REAL /* Average grade received in the course */,
  "pass_rate" REAL /* Pass rate of the course expressed as a percentage */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "max_grade" REAL /* Highest grade received in the course */,
  "min_grade" REAL /* Lowest grade received in the course */,
  "median_grade" REAL /* Median grade received in the course */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of grades in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_statistics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the notification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date the notification was posted */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Academic, Administrative) */,
  "is_urgent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification is urgent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the advisor */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the advisor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the advisor belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advisor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_advisors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisor_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor assignment */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned advisor */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned student */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the advisor assignment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the advisor assignment ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisor_assignments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisor_assignments_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES academic_advisors ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "withdrawals" (
  "withdrawal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each withdrawal record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who withdrew */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course the student withdrew from */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date of withdrawal */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the withdrawal (e.g., Medical, Academic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("withdrawal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawals_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawals_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the course material */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated course */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., syllabus, readings) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "material_title" TEXT /* Title of the course material */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Description of the course material */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the material was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the prerequisite record */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course that has prerequisites */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course that is a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_description" TEXT /* Description of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
